scripts.clean: npm run rm:node_modules && npm run rm:builds
scripts.docker:images:clean: for /F %i in ('docker images -a -q') do docker rmi -f %i
scripts.docker:clean: docker system prune && npm run docker:containers:clean && npm run docker:images:clean
scripts.prettier:write:all: npm run prettier:write:server && npm run prettier:write:identity-server && npm run prettier:write:mcp-server && npm run prettier:write:shared-server && npm run prettier:write:main-ui
